maintainer_notes.title: Product Self-Governance Is Live Here
maintainer_notes.context: This repository is the public product home for Odylith, so its own Compass, Radar, Atlas, Registry, and Casebook surfaces are expected to govern this codebase directly.
bullets: Keep product docs, product guidance, product skills, and product runtime behavior source-owned in this repository; host repos keep their own plans, bugs, specs, and diagrams locally.
Use the local Odylith governance surfaces in this repository to validate product changes before publishing a release.
Do not reintroduce host-repo-branded notes, repo labels, or ownership cues into the public product shell.
